# Frontend Context
Capture frontend stack and patterns for the host repo.

Fill this during onboarding:
- Framework: (React | Vue | Angular | Svelte | Other)
- Meta-framework: (Next.js | Nuxt | SvelteKit | None)
- State management: (Redux | Zustand | Pinia | Vuex | NgRx | Context | Other)
- API client: (fetch | axios | tanstack-query | swr | Apollo | Other)
- Styling approach: (Tailwind | CSS Modules | Styled Components | SCSS | Other)
- Component patterns: (atomic | feature-based | domain-driven)
- Testing: (Jest | Vitest | Playwright | Cypress | RTL)
- Build tooling: (Vite | Webpack | Turbopack | Other)
- Folder structure:
- Naming conventions:
- Known pitfalls (also log in `warnings.md` if critical):
